error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Hermes API Server
error.endpoint_not_found: Hermes API endpoint not found. Use the server base URL without /v1.
error.ssl_error: TLS certificate validation failed. Use a trusted certificate or disable SSL verification for this local endpoint.

user.title: Home Assistant Hermes Conversation
user.description: Connect Home Assistant Assist to a Hermes Agent API Server.

data_description.url: Use https://homeassistant.local:8443 for the Hermes add-on proxy. Server base URL only; do not include /v1.
data_description.verify_ssl: Off by default for the local Home Assistant HTTPS proxy/self-signed certificate.
data_description.prompt: System instructions sent to Hermes for each Assist request. Templates are supported.
